title: orthodon hadae
intro: Orthodon hadae, also known as the "Tiger's Eye," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Orthodon hadae include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used fresh in traditional remedies.
